name: The Hideous-Arena
short_description: "The Hideous Arena is a fast-paced run-and-gun shooter! Face relentless waves of zombies, knights, monks, and the fiery-eyed boss, Hideous! Survive, rack up kills, and climb the Steam leaderboards. How long can you last?"
detailed_description:
Welcome to The Hideous Arena — the ultimate test of your survival skills and reflexes in this relentless, fast-paced run-and-gun arena shooter! Prepare to face an endless onslaught of terrifying enemies and fight your way to the top of the Steam leaderboards.

In this brutal battle for survival, you’ll encounter a twisted variety of foes: lightning-fast zombies that never let up, massive fat zombies that crush everything in their path, vicious skeleton knights wielding deadly weapons, and an evil monk armed with a monstrous axe. But nothing compares to the ultimate nightmare — Hideous, a gigantic flaming-eyed skull boss bent on your destruction.

Armed with an arsenal of devastating weapons and a powerful kick, you’ll tear through wave after wave of enemies in an arena where every second counts. The longer you survive, the tougher and more relentless your enemies become. The only way out is to fight harder, move faster, and stay sharp.

Do you have what it takes to rise above the chaos, dominate the battlefield, and secure your place among the best on the Steam leaderboards? Step into The Hideous Arena and find out. Survive. Kill. Conquer.
